# Auto-generated template

This repository is **automatically published** from
[apotome-archetypes/archetype-mesa-ui](https://github.com/logicium/apotome-archetypes/tree/main/archetype-mesa-ui)
by `.github/workflows/publish-templates.yml` in the monorepo.
